239421.explanation: Wij zijn voorstander van een casemanager per gezin dat dit nodig heeft, analoog aan de casemanagers in de dementiezorg. Deze 'gezinscoach' kan ouders met maatwerk helpen hun situatie te verbeteren. Maatwerk en menselijkheid is hier het devies.

statements.title: The municipality of Ede should be willing to accommodate more asylum seekers than the legally required number.
statements.titleEn: The municipality of Ede should be willing to accommodate more asylum seekers than the legally required number.

statements.title: The municipality should not allow large-scale new construction projects in the villages of Ede.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should not allow large-scale new construction projects in the villages of Ede.

statements.title: On all roads where cars and cyclists share the road, the maximum speed should be reduced to 30 km/h.
statements.titleEn: On all roads where cars and cyclists share the road, the maximum speed should be reduced to 30 km/h.

statements.title: The municipality should pay for self-defense training for women.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should pay for self-defense training for women.

statements.title: Ede should object to the increase in military exercises in the municipality.
statements.titleEn: Ede should object to the increase in military exercises in the municipality.

statements.title: The municipality should return accumulated reserves to residents by lowering the property tax (ozb).
statements.titleEn: The municipality should return accumulated reserves to residents by lowering the property tax (ozb).

statements.title: At least 40% of newly built homes in Ede must be social rental housing. In the Netherlands, 28% of homes are currently social rental housing.
statements.moreInfo: Social rental homes are dwellings with a rent of up to €932.93 per month. These homes are intended for residents with lower incomes. Single people qualify for a social rental home if they earn less than €51,537 per year. For households of two or more people the limit is €56,910. At the moment about 23% of all homes in Ede are social rental housing.
statements.titleEn: At least 40% of newly built homes in Ede must be social rental housing. In the Netherlands, 28% of homes are currently social rental housing.

statements.title: New residents should receive a one-year free membership to an association in Ede from the municipality.
statements.titleEn: New residents should receive a one-year free membership to an association in Ede from the municipality.

statements.title: The municipality should stop the plans for a cultural center in the Frisokazerne.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should stop the plans for a cultural center in the Frisokazerne.

statements.title: The municipality of Ede should appoint a coordinator who monitors discrimination in the municipality.
statements.titleEn: The municipality of Ede should appoint a coordinator who monitors discrimination in the municipality.

statements.title: Elderly people should receive home visits from a welfare worker once they turn 75. Currently this is from 80.
statements.titleEn: Elderly people should receive home visits from a welfare worker once they turn 75. Currently this is from 80.

statements.title: The municipality should invest in a promotional campaign for Ede as an attractive location for businesses.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should invest in a promotional campaign for Ede as an attractive location for businesses.

statements.title: The municipality should pursue a reduction of livestock farming in Ede.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should pursue a reduction of livestock farming in Ede.

statements.title: The municipality should further postpone the ban on polluting trucks and delivery vans in the center of Ede. It is currently scheduled for January 1, 2030.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should further postpone the ban on polluting trucks and delivery vans in the center of Ede. It is currently scheduled for January 1, 2030.

statements.title: On Sundays, shops in all towns and villages of the municipality of Ede should be allowed to open.
statements.titleEn: On Sundays, shops in all towns and villages of the municipality of Ede should be allowed to open.

statements.title: When designating new reception locations for asylum seekers in Ede, a closing date must always be agreed for the location.
statements.titleEn: When designating new reception locations for asylum seekers in Ede, a closing date must always be agreed for the location.

statements.title: The municipality must allow solar panels on agricultural land.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must allow solar panels on agricultural land.

statements.title: The municipality should spend more money on deploying family coaches who can help families in difficult situations.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should spend more money on deploying family coaches who can help families in difficult situations.

statements.title: Young people should be able to use the Ede Sports Card for free.
statements.titleEn: Young people should be able to use the Ede Sports Card for free.

statements.title: The license for the coffeeshops in Ede runs until July 1, 2027. The municipality should not renew it.
statements.titleEn: The license for the coffeeshops in Ede runs until July 1, 2027. The municipality should not renew it.

statements.title: The municipality must levy a tax on buildings that have been vacant for more than a year.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must levy a tax on buildings that have been vacant for more than a year.

statements.title: The municipality must prevent agricultural land in Ede from being converted into nature reserves.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must prevent agricultural land in Ede from being converted into nature reserves.

statements.title: The municipality must offer homeless people in Ede a rental home.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must offer homeless people in Ede a rental home.

statements.title: The municipality must urge the police to check fatbike riders more often for violations.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must urge the police to check fatbike riders more often for violations.

statements.title: The municipality may not replace parking spaces within the built-up area with greenery.
statements.titleEn: The municipality may not replace parking spaces within the built-up area with greenery.

statements.title: The number of parking spaces in the municipality of Ede must be reduced.
statements.titleEn: The number of parking spaces in the municipality of Ede must be reduced.

statements.title: The municipality should stop forgiving municipal taxes for low-income residents.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should stop forgiving municipal taxes for low-income residents.

statements.title: The municipality must invest all tourist tax revenue it receives in the maintenance of nature areas that attract many tourists.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must invest all tourist tax revenue it receives in the maintenance of nature areas that attract many tourists.

statements.title: In the municipality of Ede, residential apartment buildings up to 70 meters high may be built.
statements.titleEn: In the municipality of Ede, residential apartment buildings up to 70 meters high may be built.

statements.title: The open-air theatre in Ede should be able to increase the number of large events from 8 to 12 per year.
statements.titleEn: The open-air theatre in Ede should be able to increase the number of large events from 8 to 12 per year.

shootoutStatements.title: The municipality should urge the police in Ede to stop using police dogs.
The municipality should urge the police to restore the cell complex at the police station in Ede.
Ede should provide shelter to asylum seekers who are not allowed to stay in the Netherlands.
Reception centers for asylum seekers should not be located on the edges of residential areas, but in the middle of neighborhoods.
The municipality should close off more nature areas to recreation.
More public toilets should be provided in the municipality of Ede.
The municipality should spend less money on arts and culture.
The municipality should give refugees with a residence permit priority for social rental housing.
Municipal civil servants should do a community service placement every year.
The municipality should allow fewer festivals and events.
The municipality should abolish the dog tax.
When allocating a social rental home, applicants from the municipality should be given priority as much as possible.
Poverty assistance schemes should be made available to more residents.
People buying their first home can get a starter loan if the house is not more expensive than €355,000. That threshold should be raised.
Ede should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) focused on safety.
On Coming Out Day, October 11, the rainbow flag should be displayed at sports clubs in Ede.
The municipality should urge the province to take effective measures against wolf nuisance.
Municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) in Ede can wear a small camera on their uniform. That should remain allowed.
The municipality of Ede should give low-income people money to pay a veterinarian bill.
The municipality should take responsibility itself for building new homes.
Every child in the municipality of Ede should be able to have breakfast at school for free. The municipality should pay for it.
New high-rise buildings in the municipality of Ede may only be allowed in the station area and in the center of Ede-Stad.
